message: 🌱 Add argo-workflows: Successfully finished pods show stuck in pending phase mission (#626)

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,80 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "argo-workflows-6256-successfully-finished-pods-show-stuck-in-pending-phase-indef",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "argo-workflows: Successfully finished pods show stuck in pending phase indefinitely in GKE + Kubernetes v1.20",
+    "description": "Successfully finished pods show stuck in pending phase indefinitely in GKE + Kubernetes v1.20. Requested by 85+ users.",
+    "type": "feature",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check current argo-workflows deployment",
+        "description": "Verify your argo-workflows version and configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n argo-workflows -l app.kubernetes.io/name=argo-workflows\nhelm list -n argo-workflows 2>/dev/null || echo \"Not installed via Helm\"\n```\nThis feature requires a working argo-workflows installation."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review argo-workflows configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant argo-workflows configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n argo-workflows -l app.kubernetes.io/name=argo-workflows\nkubectl get configmap -n argo-workflows -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=argo-workflows\n```\nWe were running reasonably complex Argo workflows without issues for a long time."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for Successfully finished pods show stuck in pending phase",
+        "description": "> We have used 's ALWAYS_OFFLOAD_NODE_STATUS workaround and we were able to at least finish our workload without Timeout issues.\n> Without it, whole workflow fails around 70/300 step so it's probably connected to the size of the workload being written?\n> However with this workaround Argo and\n```yaml\n# Simplified failing part of workflow. \n Parents-parent\n    our-workflow-1625018400-118234800:\n      boundaryID: our-workflow-1625018400-2940179300\n      children:\n        - our-workflow-1625018400-1820417972\n        - our-workflow-1625018400-1463043834\n      displayName: '[2]'\n      finishedAt: null\n      id: our-workflow-1625018400-118234800\n      name: our-workflow-1625018400[2].fill-supervised-product-clusters[0].fill-supervised-product-cluster(19:configs:[\"things\"],products:[\"params\"],supervised-configs:[])[2]\n      phase: Running\n      progress: 0/2\n      startedAt: \"2021-06-30T09:34:44Z\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the feature works",
+        "description": "Test that the new capability is working as expected:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n argo-workflows -l app.kubernetes.io/name=argo-workflows\nkubectl get events -n argo-workflows --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm the feature described in \"Successfully finished pods show stuck in pending phase\" is functioning correctly."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "> We have used 's ALWAYS_OFFLOAD_NODE_STATUS workaround and we were able to at least finish our workload without Timeout issues.\n> Without it, whole workflow fails around 70/300 step so it's probably connected to the size of the workload being written?\n> However with this workaround Argo and Argo-UI doesn't work properly as mentioned in his comment.",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "# Simplified failing part of workflow. \n Parents-parent\n    our-workflow-1625018400-118234800:\n      boundaryID: our-workflow-1625018400-2940179300\n      children:\n        - our-workflow-1625018400-1820417972\n        - our-workflow-1625018400-1463043834\n      displayName: '[2]'\n      finishedAt: null\n      id: our-workflow-1625018400-118234800\n      name: our-workflow-1625018400[2].fill-supervised-product-clusters[0].fill-supervised-product-cluster(19:configs:[\"things\"],products:[\"params\"],supervised-configs:[])[2]\n      phase: Running\n      progress: 0/2\n      startedAt: \"2021-06-30T09:34:44Z\"\n      templateScope: local/our-workflow-1625018400\n      type: StepGroup   \n  Parent stuck running\n    our-workflow-1625018400-1820417972:\n      boundaryID: our-workflow-1625018400-2940179300\n      ",
+        "# Other than that is acting like this: \ntime=\"2021-06-30T11:59:37.960Z\" level=info msg=\"template (node failing-workflow-1625018400-2046183375) active children parallelism reached 3/3\" namespace=default workflow=failing-workflow-1625018400\ntime=\"2021-06-30T11:59:37.960Z\" level=info msg=\"template (node failing-workflow-1625018400-2046183375) active children parallelism reached 3/3\" namespace=default workflow=failing-workflow-1625018400\ntime=\"2021-06-30T11:59:37.961Z\" level=info msg=\"template (node failing-workflow-1625018400-2046183375) active children parallelism reached 3/3\" namespace=default workflow=failing-workflow-1625018400\ntime=\"2021-06-30T11:59:37.962Z\" level=info msg=\"template (node failing-workflow-1625018400-2046183375) active children parallelism reached 3/3\" namespace=default w",
+        "export ARGO_SERVER=localhost:2746\nexport ARGO_TOKEN=$(argo auth token)\nexport ARGO_SECURE=false"
+      ]
+    }
+  },
+  "metadata": {
+    "tags": [
+      "argo-workflows",
+      "graduated",
+      "app-definition",
+      "feature"
+    ],

+      "issue": "https://github.com/argoproj/argo-workflows/issues/6256",
+      "repo": "https://github.com/argoproj/argo-workflows"
+    },
+    "reactions": 85,

+    "synthesizedBy": "copilot"
+  },

+    "kubernetes": ">=1.24",

+      "kubectl"
